rationale: In the citing paper, Wang, Gupta, and Grewal (2017) appears only in a brief methodological aside: it is listed as one of the prior applications of the Copula-based, instrument-free endogeneity approach. The paper does not engage this cited study's theory, constructs, data, or findings in hypothesis development, model specification, or interpretation of results. Because the citation functions as a generic example in a grouped reference rather than a distinct building block, its role is a passing mention.
